pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)This entity is scary because it is not always clear if you really saw it. It turns empty places and far-away movement into something suspicious.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)Its fear comes from doubt. The next sighting could be closer.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Presence$()$(br2)It does not need to attack all the time to stay frightening.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)A short appearance is enough to make the whole area feel wrong.
